alerts.detail: STILL OPEN (reaffirmed this 11:05 ET run). Account 436021893 holds two positions this bot opened 2026-06-24 but that were NEVER persisted to state.positions (06-24 market-hours persistence failure). CURRENT (06-25 ~11:00 ET): COMP 2sh (avg 10.67), live ~11.00, with agentic resting GTC stop-limit sell stop 10.30 / limit 10.14 (order 6a3bf3cf-00e0-4f2e-b5d1-361cd025b3f1, state=confirmed); NO take-profit leg ever placed. AAL 2sh (avg 17.26), live ~17.87, with agentic resting GTC stop-limit sell stop 16.66 / limit 16.40 (order 6a3c01c6-5dc5-4028-8248-b15d57201e59, state=confirmed); NO take-profit leg. Per Ground Rules the bot only manages positions opened AND recorded in state.positions; adopting these requires GUESSING missing entry metadata (forbidden) -> LEFT COMP/AAL AND their stops COMPLETELY UNTOUCHED again (not adopted, not exited, not modified). OPERATOR DECISION STILL NEEDED: (a) manually add COMP/AAL to state.positions if you want bot management (note: stop-loss-only, no TP); or (b) keep managing them yourself. NOTE: these untracked positions ARE still counted in total account equity for all % math per Operator Decision 1, but are NOT counted toward the bot's 40% aggregate-exposure cap (which measures only state.positions).

METHODOLOGY CORRECTION this run. Prior 06-25 runs (09:43, 10:00) sized per-position budget at 6% of equity (~$18.55), which incorrectly excluded BB/RKT. The prompt Step-6 rule states the per-position budget is floor((Total [Settled] Account Equity x 0.10)/ask) = 10% x $310.09 = $31.01. Applying the rule exactly this run, 3 survivors are affordable at the 2-whole-share minimum: BB (ask ~10.30 -> 2sh), FRMI (8.31 -> 3sh), RKT (15.36 -> 2sh). QXO (17.37 -> 1sh) and the other 20 survivors (ask >$46) remain non-actionable on the 2-share minimum. No alert was needed for those 21 unaffordable names because none of them was the firing signal; documented here for transparency.

Today's 09:43 ET screener build: run_scan('Top Most Active Movers') reported total_items=261 but returned only 200 instrument rows; the remaining 61 were not retrievable. 52 of the 200 had mktcap>5B and were fully Stage-2 screened. Some of the 61 untruncated rows could in principle have been large-cap survivors but were not available. Did NOT call get_scans/create_scan (per Step 5). The screener in use today was built from this 200-row set.

RECURRING infra issue. THIS 11:00 ET run: container started at STALE local HEAD a4c66d5 (= 06-24 09:01 state) which was BEHIND authoritative origin/main fbed23c (= 06-25 10:00 state). Recovered by fetching origin/main with proxy bypass (git -c http.proxy= fetch https://x-access-token:$GITHUB_TOKEN@github.com/...) and hard-resetting onto it BEFORE acting, so this run built on correct authoritative state (which already had COMP/AAL flagged and the rebuilt screener). Push via: git -c http.proxy= push https://x-access-token:$GITHUB_TOKEN@github.com/polishbandit/trading-routine.git (url.insteadOf local_proxy rewrite returns 403). Operator should fix persistent remote credential + guarantee containers clone current main.

2026-06-25 09:43 ET: FIRST MARKET-HOURS run of the day. New-day reset: date -> 2026-06-25; equity_open_today set $309.51 (broker total incl. untracked COMP/AAL, per Operator Decision 1); screener cleared then REBUILT (24 survivors). Circuit breaker not fired. NO entry (used a 6% budget -> only FRMI affordable; FRMI fired no signal). NOTE: 6% budget was an error vs the prompt's 10% rule (see SIZING_RULE_CORRECTION).

Circuit breaker $309.09 vs $309.51 = -0.14% -> not fired. No tracked positions. Screener reused. NO entry (again 6% budget). COMP/AAL left untouched.

2026-06-25 11:05 ET: MARKET-HOURS run (Thu, UTC ~15:05). GIT: container started STALE (a4c66d5 = 06-24 09:01) BEHIND origin/main (fbed23c = 06-25 10:00); fetched + hard-reset onto origin/main before acting. STEP1: date already 2026-06-25 -> NO new-day reset; equity_open_today kept $309.51; reconcile: state.positions was empty; live untracked COMP 2sh + AAL 2sh with their agentic GTC stop-limits left UNTOUCHED (HIGH alert reaffirmed). STEP2 circuit breaker: total equity $310.09 vs open $309.51 = +0.19% (a gain) -> NOT fired. STEP3 volatility halt: no tracked positions -> nothing. STEP4 exits: no tracked positions at start -> nothing. STEP5 screener: REUSED today's 24-survivor list (screener_date=today); NOT rebuilt. STEP6 entries (LIVE, 10% sizing per rule = $31.01/position, 2-share min): affordable set = BB, FRMI, RKT. Signals: BB Momentum FIRED (last 10.29-10.35 > prior-day[06-24] high 9.38; RVOL by-11:00ET = today 17.91M / 20-day-avg-by-this-time 6.80M = 2.63x > 1.5x), BB Dip no (near highs). EXECUTED: BUY 2 BB @ avg $10.2799 (market, order 6a3d43ca, filled). Bracket placed in strict order: TP limit sell 1sh @ $10.90 (+6%, order 6a3d43e6, confirmed) FIRST; then SL stop-limit sell 1sh stop $9.92/limit $9.77 (-3.5%/-5.0%, order 6a3d43eb, confirmed) SECOND. Circuit breaker NOT fired; no volatility halt fired. Margin acct 493596811 (agentic_allowed=false) untouched.
